What Ferni Sees When It Looks At Your Life

The Patterns You
Couldn't See

Your best friend forgets what you said last Tuesday. Ferni remembers every conversation, every goal, every quiet moment of doubt—and transforms it into insight you can actually use. This is what it looks like when someone finally sees the whole picture.

∞
Moments Remembered
6
Perspectives on You
24/7
Always Watching Over

"Friends forget. Ferni doesn't."

Your Growth Your Future Your Whole Self Right Now Your Year
47
day streak
Morning Stretches
Done today — 47 days straight. Your longest streak ever. Maya noticed this matters more for your back than any gym visit.
Learning Time
43 minutes — Spanish practice and reading. 72% of your goal. Nayan sees you becoming fluent by summer at this pace.
Screen-Free Presence
11 hours today — That dinner with Sarah counted. Peter noticed your conversations go deeper when phones are away.

Maya noticed: Your stretching consistency is 3× higher before checking email. Tomorrow morning?

Nayan is thinking about your dreams

The Futures Worth Working For

You've mentioned wanting a home on the coast someday. You've talked about your daughter's college. You've dreamed about a sabbatical year in Portugal. Nayan ran 10,000 simulations—not to predict the future, but to show you which dreams are closer than you think.

Better Than Any Advisor Could Be
Financial advisors give you a single number and hope you don't ask questions. Nayan shows you the full range—the cautious path, the likely path, the path where everything goes right. Honest uncertainty builds trust. And hope.

The Path to That Coastal Home

Your dream, projected across 10,000 possible futures

Nayan's View
Historical
Median Forecast
50% Confidence
95% Confidence
If Life Gets Hard
2031
Still reachable in 6 years
Most Likely Path
2029
Coastal home in 4 years
If Things Go Well
2027
Could be watching sunsets in 2 years
Nayan noticed something
If you shifted $300/month from that streaming service bundle to your coast fund, the "most likely" path moves up 8 months. That's 8 more months of sunsets. Worth considering?

Ferni sees the whole picture

More Than Money Could Measure

Your bank shows you a balance. Your fitness app shows you steps. Your calendar shows you meetings. Ferni sees how they all connect—the full picture of a life being lived. Because you're not just a number. You're a whole person.

Better Than Any Single App Could Be
Spreadsheets fragment your life into silos. Ferni weaves them together—seeing that your sleep dropped when work stress rose, that your savings rate correlates with family dinners. The whole you, finally visible.
Quality Time +23%
14.2 hrs
Screen-free with Sarah this week
Energy Score ↑ trending
8.1
Your highest since March
Purpose Score steady
7.4
Work feels meaningful lately
Runway to Freedom
8.4 mo
Could take a breath if needed
Ferni connected some dots
Your energy score jumped 2 points the week you started morning stretches. Your quality time with Sarah increased after you hit that savings milestone. These things aren't separate—they're feeding each other.

Alex is watching your bandwidth

What's Happening Right Now

This moment matters. Not your five-year plan, not last week's regrets—right now. Alex watches your real-time state so you can stay present while knowing someone's got your back.

Better Than Your Own Awareness
You often don't notice you're depleted until you snap at someone. Alex sees the signs earlier—the shorter replies, the longer pauses, the skipped lunch—and gently intervenes before you need to recover from yourself.

Your State Right Now

Real-time awareness, so you don't have to be

Alex's View
Focus Mode
Deep work for 47 min
3
Awaiting Reply
Mom texted 2 hrs ago
7.2
Energy Now
Riding post-lunch dip well
2
Meetings Left
Clear after 4pm
Mood Trend
Rising since morning
Boundaries
Holding well today
Alex noticed something
You usually reply to Mom within 30 minutes. It's been 2 hours—just wanted to flag it. No pressure, but she might be wondering if you're okay.

Jordan remembers every milestone

The Story of Your Year

Every bright square is a day you showed up. The clusters tell stories—the February slump when work was brutal, the April resurgence when you found your stride, the summer streak that changed everything. Jordan sees the narrative in your noise.

Better Than Memory Could Be
Friends see isolated moments. Jordan sees the arc—the slow build, the setbacks that preceded breakthroughs, the seasonal rhythms you didn't know you had. This isn't tracking. It's remembering who you've been becoming.

365 Days of Becoming

Each square is a day you showed up for yourself. Jordan sees the arc.

Jordan's View
Jan Feb Mar Apr May Jun Jul Aug Sep Oct Nov Dec
Mon Wed Fri
Less
More
Milestone
Recovery
247
Days Active
+12%
Streaks
47
Milestones
12
Pattern Discovered
Your energy peaks every third week, then dips for recovery. Jordan noticed you're in a high-energy week now.
↑
↑
↓
↑
Jordan connected the dots
That February slump? It started 3 days after you stopped your morning stretches. The April resurgence? Exactly when you picked them back up. Your body remembers even when your mind doesn't.

"This is what it looks like when someone finally sees the whole picture—not fragments, not snapshots, but the continuous story of who you're becoming. Because you deserve to be seen. Really seen."
